jobs.author: andrew_lang
jobs.title: Blue Beard
jobs.prompt: A Studio Ghibli-inspired, hand-painted watercolor book cover illustration depicting the climactic scene of Bluebeard. Sister Anne, with long dark hair blowing in the wind, stands atop a tall, ancient stone tower, her dress a pale blue. She strains her eyes towards the horizon. Below in the courtyard, Bluebeard, a tall, imposing figure with a menacing blue beard and dark blue coat, is framed in the arched doorway of the tower, brandishing a large, gleaming silver sabre. Faint dust swirls in the air. Warm, soft lighting emphasizes the desperate mood and the contrast between hope and imminent danger. The color palette consists of warm yellows and greens in the distant landscape, contrasting with the cool blues and grays of the tower and Bluebeard's clothing. A fairytale atmosphere is achieved through the detailed rendering of the stone textures and the dynamic poses of the characters.

jobs.author: andrew_lang
jobs.title: Cinderella; or, the little glass slipper
jobs.prompt: A Studio Ghibli-inspired, hand-painted watercolor book cover illustration showing Cinderella in her glittering gown of gold and silver, adorned with jewels, descending from the golden pumpkin coach. The handsome, young Prince, with soft brown hair and kind eyes, reaches out to take her hand. Six dapple-grey horses and six footmen in gold and silver livery stand by as the jolly rat coachman with smart whiskers grins. The scene is set outside the castle, bathed in warm, soft lighting, suggesting a magical, fairy-tale atmosphere just before midnight. The castle glows in the background, with a hint of the ballroom visible through the arched doorway. Cinderella's glass slippers sparkle as she steps onto the cobbled path. Mood: joyous, enchanted, romantic.
